homepage.text_excerpt: Homepage - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon Skip to main content Mary Glindon Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend About Privacy Policy Contact Policy My work in Parliament More Menu Mary Glindon MP Mary Glindon is the elected Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend, Mary was elected to this position at the 2024 General election. Mary Glindon previously served as the MP for North Tyneside from 2010 until 2024. If you need any advice or support or would like to contact Mary you can find her contact details on this website. Follow on social media Mary Glindon Further details Promoted by Eddie Darke on behalf of Mary Glindon, both at Ruby Court, 1a Wesley Way, Newcastle, NE12 9UP You can view my privacy policy here https://maryglindon.com/privacy-policy/ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: About - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend
pages.text_excerpt: About - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon Skip to main content Mary Glindon Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend About Privacy Policy Contact Policy My work in Parliament More Menu About Mary was first elected as the Member of Parliament for North Tyneside at the 2010 General Election, at the 2024 general election Mary was elected as the Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend. Mary’s husband Ray sadly passed away in 2020, Mary is a loving mother and grandmother. Before serving as an MP Mary was a Councillor in the Battle Hill ward on North Tyneside Council. In Parliament Mary has served as a Shadow Minister and as a member of the Whips team. Mary has sat on many Parliamentary committees and chairs a number of All Party Parliamentary groups. Mary Glindon Further details Promoted by Eddie Darke on behalf of Mary Glindon, both at Ruby Court, 1a Wesley Way, Newcastle, NE12 9UP You can view my privacy policy here https://maryglindon.com/privacy-policy/ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Contact - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon Skip to main content Mary Glindon Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend About Privacy Policy Contact Policy My work in Parliament More Menu Contact Mary’s role is to represent you as a constituent within the Newcastle East and Wallsend Constituency, regardless of your politics. Not sure if you’re a constituent? Check here . If you’re concerned about a local or national issue Mary can make representations on your behalf to the government, Newcastle Council or North Tyneside Council or other agencies and will keep you informed about your case. If you would like Mary’s help, please get in touch either by phone, email or post and make sure you provide the following information; Your full name and postal address A contact telephone number Any reference numbers that relate to your case A summary of your problem, including any steps you may have already taken to try and resolve it Advice Surgeries My office is open for surgeries by appointment. Please use the contact details below to make an appointment. My office is also available by email and on the telephone. Contact Mary Email – [email protected] Telephone – 0191 2342493 Write to – Mary Glindon MP, Swans Centre for Innovation, Station Road, Wallsend, NE28 6HJ MPs can help you with matters such as: Tax problems involving HM Revenue & Customs (but not issues with, for example, the council tax, which is administered by your local authority). Problems with hospitals and the NHS. Problems with benefits, pensions and national insurance. Issues dealt with by the Government departments. MPs can raise concerns with the police on behalf of a constituent, but have no role in decision-making or law enforcement. MPs do not have jurisdiction over local council decisions or policy. However, they can write to a local council and ask them to investigate a problem or reconsider an issue. MPs cannot help you Private disputes with other individuals or with companies. MPs cannot offer legal advice and have no jurisdiction over the police or the courts. Constituents are therefore advised to consult with a solicitor should they need professional advice for legal disputes. They also cannot provide any financial or business advice. An MP is not able to assist in settling family arguments or private disputes with neighbours or employers. Follow on social media Mary Glindon Further details Promoted by Eddie Darke on behalf of Mary Glindon, both at Ruby Court, 1a Wesley Way, Newcastle, NE12 9UP You can view my privacy policy here https://maryglindon.com/privacy-policy/ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: My work in Parliament - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend
pages.text_excerpt: My work in Parliament - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon Skip to main content Mary Glindon Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend About Privacy Policy Contact Policy My work in Parliament More Menu My work in Parliament My work in Parliament is wide-ranging and includes attending debates, voting on legislation, asking questions both in writing and in the chamber, serving on committees, raising issues on behalf of constituents, meeting with ministers and stakeholders, participating in All-Party Parliamentary Groups (APPGs), campaigning on national and local issues, managing constituency casework, and attending policy briefings. You can follow the links below to view my spoken contributions in Parliament, voting record, written questions, and the Early Day Motions I have supported. My speaking contributions in Parliament Early Day Motions Written Questions Voting Record Mary Glindon Further details Promoted by Eddie Darke on behalf of Mary Glindon, both at Ruby Court, 1a Wesley Way, Newcastle, NE12 9UP You can view my privacy policy here https://maryglindon.com/privacy-policy/ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
